description: a vintage 8-bit home video game cartridge, rounded-rectangle dark forest-green plastic shell with a ridged top edge, three-quarter front view, with a large blank cream paper label panel in the center (completely empty: no illustration, no text, no logo), gently worn edges

a vintage 16-bit home video game cartridge, taller rounded-rectangle plastic shell with a curved finger-grip ridge along the top, three-quarter front view, with a large blank cream paper label panel in the center (completely empty: no illustration, no text, no logo), gently worn edges

a vintage vinyl LP record sleeve, flat front-facing perfect square, with a completely blank cream cover (empty: no illustration, no text, no logo), subtle corner wear and a faint ring impression, thin printed inner border
a vintage CD jewel case seen front-facing, with a completely blank cream cover insert behind the clear plastic (empty: no illustration, no text, no logo), a few faint scratches on the case
a small fanned-out stack of five collectible trading cards with completely blank cream faces (empty: no illustration, no text), identical ornate decorative borders on every card, top-down view

a vintage flat plastic optical-disc game jewel case seen front-facing, with a completely blank cream cover insert behind the clear plastic (empty: no illustration, no text, no logo), a plain blank colored spine strip, slight scratches on the case

a vintage European comic-book hardcover album standing front-facing in portrait format, with a completely blank cream cover (empty: no illustration, no text, no logo), cloth spine, slightly worn corners
